series_metadata.series_description: These forms are submitted to the Department of Taxation by the Treasurer of State as a record of how much money was paid into various funds for a batch of tax returns. We receive these forms for beer, wine, cigarette, and severance tax returns.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Forms will be destroyed three years end of calendar year in which money was deposited in accordance with 5743.071, 4301.47 and 5749.11. If scanned, . ; Electronic: end of calendar year in which money was deposited in accordance with 5743.071, 4301.47 and 5749.11
